title: Aggregate-preserving join to retain parent rows
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.users_with_recent_post_counts/0` that returns every user (INCLUDING those with no recent posts) with the count of their posts from the last 7 days. The left_join's filter (last 7 days) MUST be inside the `on:` clause, not in the `where:`, or users with zero recent posts will disappear. Use `coalesce(count(p.id), 0)` and group by user fields. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Subtle semantic bug (where-vs-on on left join) that most Claude attempts miss. Also combines aggregate + coalesce.
